title: Business Capital
goalDescription: Raising your own capital to start or grow a small business, before or alongside seeking outside funding.
resultIntro: Here's a starting point for building your business capital, based on what you entered.

questions.label: Estimated capital needed
questions.help: Startup costs, initial stock, or working capital — a rough figure is fine.

questions.label: Amount already saved toward this goal
Expected annual return on savings (%)
questions.help: Leave at 0% if this will sit in a regular savings account rather than an interest-bearing one.
